text: Many cars are traveling along a city street.
A moped scooter parked below a window of a house.
Sliced apples, one whole apple and a half of a lemon.
Two ladies with umbrellas greet a man with a guitar.
Light filters into an empty room containing a table and chairs and extensive open counter space.
A surfer rides a sizable wave on the ocean.
A businessman checking his cell phone on a crowded commuter train.
Pair of zebras standing in grassy field outdoors.
A man that is sitting on a chair under an umbrella in the sand.
A bathroom sink in a bathroom under a large mirror.
